title: coccoloba excelsa var. glabra
intro: Coccoloba excelsa var. glabra, also known as the smooth sea grape, is a plant species in the Polygonaceae family. It is a type of shrub or small tree native to the Caribbean and Central America, characterized by its smooth, hairless branches and bright red or purple fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coccoloba excelsa var. glabra include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting digestive health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
